commands.review_summary:
This Dependabot PR bumps GitHub Actions versions across CI, CodeQL, dependency-review, and release workflows: checkout to v7, pnpm/action-setup and setup-node to v6, and upload-artifact to v7.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a workflow dependency maintenance PR, not a bug report. The observable validation is the PR check rollup: verify and CodeQL passed, while dependency-review failed due repository setup.
